title: Recalcitrant
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Recalcitrant''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warship that took part in the [[Battle of ThonBoka]]. It opened fire on [[Silentium|The Rest]] when they arrived to break up the battle, and was subsequently destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''

|de=Recalcitrant
